productDisplayName: Puma Men Drift Cat Black Shoes
description: These stylish Drift cat III shoes from puma have a motorsport friendly design and are great for urban wear. These shoes are infused with the ferrari edge and their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and a tee for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic leather uppers for durability and protectionLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortBrand name embroidered on the tongue, cat logo embossed on the side and cat logo on the heel counterElasticated loop with velcro closure for a snug Fit and easy insertion and removal of the feetMidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioningPhylon midsole for greater lightweight comfortOutsoleNon-slip rubber outsole in a tyre tread pattern for greater tractionFlex grooves for greater flexibility of the feetSole extending to heel counter for greater protection of the heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
